name: St.Joan's School - Salt Lake

address.Address: GD-346A, 1st Cross Rd, GD Block, Sector 3, Bidhannagar, Kolkata, West Bengal 700106, India

address.streetAddress: GD-346A, 1st Cross Rd, GD Block, Sector 3, Bidhannagar, Kolkata, West Bengal 700106, India

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Ok so here are my reviews about this school there are good side and bad side

Good side
1: this school has more facilities were provided 
2: this school has co curricular activities 
3: this school has ptm were provided successfully 
4: this school has computers where students come to learn this 

Bad side
1: the school computer classes were only computer science which is class 11-12 subjects were teach in classes 6-12 and 1-5 classes html coding which is very very difficult to study 
2: the teachers were actually good but the principal and vice principal was horrible they usually don't care about anything and likes money
3: school fees was very high
4: when you going to purchase books they gave you different classes of books (example: you are in class 9 but they gave you classes 11-12 or class 10 books) and they gave you hundreds of notebook which the weightage is very very high and difficult to carry
5: this school has co curricular activities but in classes 6 onwards no curricular activities only pressure and study only 
6: in other school when you fail they have to repeat the classes but in this school they gave you free promotion which is trial basis but this is a trap because when you going to different schools they won't allow you because the report card said trial basis and principal won't removing it 
7: this school has chinese communist book inside the Mandarin room which is an innapropriate to children about Chinese things and wars of China 
8: in this school teachers usually going to get home at 11:00pm which is not a good one because the cars and taxi never come at this point 
9: this school has too much exams day by day which those syllabus were never be completed even the boards students too 
10: they gave hundreds of lesson plans when they completed the half syllabus they still have you lesson plan in Google classroom make it very difficult to learn like this and print out may cost huge amount of money and pages were wasted 
11: they usually don't do sports day for senior students only junior can come to sports day and the first sports day in senior was November 
12: if you wanted to join activity classes you need to submit your name from the activity classes but the thing is that they usually choose random students which is worst for us 
13: in this school they have a science exhibition for classes 8-12 and the thing is that students purchase those products which is around the cost of ₹7,000 and to carry this was very very difficult 
14: in this school that you have to get pressurised by studies and holiday homework was a model to make the model and it takes a lot of time to complete those models and say that did you enjoy the holidays like why 
15: this school the library is use for only toppers who got 97-99% in exams not for failure students nor avarage students and the exams to get 99% were very impossible 
16: this school is a nightmare of students as well as parents they usually talk illiterate and don't know how to communicate with parents 

This is my whole year of this school and it was horrible and never cared for us just only money and money
Very good school...Has a complete Balance of studies as well as co curriculum activities
It's really nice and friends all the teacher and students staffs are so cooperate. I'm thankful to my parents that I got such a interactive school.
My son studies here and by God's grace, we made the right decision to let him study here

A very well disciplined school, takes a great care of students, you might feel a bit pressure in studies but honestly, it helps you in the long run. The teachers clears every concepts very well. We also have exhibitions which helps us reflect our talent. Overall an excellent school to study.....
An outstanding school with a fantastic learning environment! The teachers are dedicated, supportive, and truly care about each student’s success.

It's one of the best schools I have ever known. I have been studying from Infant class and now, I'm in class 10. It has excellent faculties and offers latest education models. It has introduced Robotics and A.I. for better S.T.E.M. education. Recently, our school had participated in the Inter-School Robotics Championship organised by CISCE. Total 250 teams participated from Eastern Zon and we qualified amongst the Top 6 teams from this Zonal Round. I myself was a part of the team. Our school encouraged us a lot and provided us with each and everything we required. One can also study Mandarin language. Unlike many other schools, it maintains a strict discipline. Our Principal Ma'am Mrs. Debjani Ghosh is one of the greatest persons I have ever seen in my life. Our school has an excellent way of teaching. Along with a lot of pressure on studies, it also gives lot of attractive holidays. Our school supports us as much as possible. I feel very lucky to be a part of this school.

I have been a student at St. Joan's for 12 years and am currently in class 10. Attending here has been an exceptional experience! The dedication and expertise of the teachers have truly enriched my learning journey. The school offers a diverse curriculum and numerous extracurricular activities, ensuring a well-rounded education. The supportive and inclusive environment fosters both personal and academic growth. Facilities are top-notch, and the school's focus on holistic development is commendable. I couldn't be more grateful to be a part of such a wonderful institution.
I would say the best school in Kolkata  and the best part about this school is discipline.

This school is really very good and I am studying in this school for past 12 years. This school is engaged with all sorts of co-cirriculum activities and recently this school participated in the robotics competition and has performed exceptionally well. I highly recommend this school. Thank you.
